# Ashwin Joseph Kurian

## About
Ashwin Joseph Kurian also more commonly referred to as Ashwin Joseph is a robotics engineer focused on building multi-modal perception stack for autonomous systems (LiDAR, Radar, IMU, GNSS, Cameras) , Imitation learning, Deep Learning, GEN AI to semantic 3D maps, digital twins and simulation. 

## Website
https://ashwinjoseph.com

## Projects
Portfolio of projects, technical writing, and engineering work.
